hero.title: Product Floral Effect
hero.description: Surround your products with blooming floral effects and artistic petals using AI. Instantly create romantic, dreamy, or premium-looking visuals that elevate cosmetics, jewelry, fashion, and lifestyle products. Perfect for campaigns that need a soft, elevated aesthetic.
hero.inputPlaceholder: Upload your product image to add floral effects

steps.title: Upload your base product photo
steps.description: Use a clear shot of the cosmetic, jewelry, perfume, or lifestyle product you want to highlight.

steps.title: Choose floral style and mood
steps.description: Select soft romantic blooms, bold graphic florals, minimal petals, or high-fashion editorial looks.

steps.title: Let AI add floral visual effects
steps.description: AI composes flowers, petals, and atmospheric details that frame and enhance your product with realistic depth.

steps.title: Export for campaigns, banners, and social
steps.description: Download finished visuals for hero banners, seasonal campaigns, e-commerce, and social media posts.

items.question: What is the Product Floral Effect workflow?
items.answer: Product Floral Effect is an AI-powered workflow that adds beautiful floral effects and botanical elements to product images and videos. Create stunning floral arrangements and nature-inspired visual enhancements for your products.

items.question: Who is Product Floral Effect designed for?
items.answer: Product Floral Effect is perfect for beauty and lifestyle brands: cosmetics companies, skincare brands, wellness products, and lifestyle marketers who need botanical visual enhancements.

items.question: What kind of input do I need to start?
items.answer: You upload your product image or describe your product, then specify the type of floral effects you want to add, including flower types, colors, and arrangement style.

items.question: What type of output can I expect from this workflow?
items.answer: The workflow generates product images and videos with beautiful, realistic floral effects, botanical elements, and nature-inspired visual enhancements.

items.question: Can I create different floral styles?
items.answer: Yes. Generate various floral effect styles including romantic bouquets, tropical arrangements, minimalist botanicals, and seasonal flower designs.

items.question: How do credits and pricing work for Product Floral Effect?
items.answer: Each floral effect generation consumes credits based on the complexity and number of floral elements. Costs are optimized compared to professional floral photography and design.

items.question: Is this suitable for seasonal campaigns?
items.answer: Absolutely. Create seasonal floral effects for spring, summer, holidays, and special occasions to keep your product marketing fresh and relevant.

items.question: Can I maintain brand consistency with floral effects?
items.answer: Yes. The workflow can incorporate your brand colors and style guidelines to create floral effects that complement your brand identity.
